name: skyline-daemon
description: skyline MCP daemon up/down. Down: silently wait and retry skyline, never fall back to native tools. Up: resume silently.

name: skyline-friction-nudge
description: New skyline devlog friction (stale-tag/guide-gate/fallback) — file via skyline_report_issue after searching open+closed issues. Inert until observability streams are enabled.
